pi_items.metadata_value: Navigate to the Eiffel Tower in Paris, France.
pi_items.verified_value: Navigate to the Eiffel Tower in Paris, France.

privileged_info_summary: The Eiffel Tower is located in Paris, France, at coordinates approximately 48.8584° N, 2.2945° E. It is situated on the Champ de Mars near the Seine River.
